title: The 10-Minute Automation ROI Calculator
subtitle: Plug in 5 numbers. Get your monthly savings, payback window, and the 3 automations I'd prioritize for your setup.

inputs.label: Manual hours per person per week
inputs.hint: Repetitive data entry, status reports, intake, invoicing.

inputs.label: Expected automation coverage
inputs.hint: How much of the manual work realistically automates.

inputs.label: One-time build investment
inputs.hint: What you'd pay an agency or internal team for the initial build.

tier_thresholds.high_label: Leave money on the table if you don't

recommendations.text: Your top leak is likely intake + onboarding. Build a n8n workflow that does intake-form → CRM → welcome email in one hop. Usually saves 3-5 hrs/person/week.
Status reports are the next win. Claude + your PM tool API can auto-generate weekly client updates in 30 seconds instead of 30 minutes per account.
Build investment is too high relative to savings. Shrink the scope — pick ONE process under $4K build cost, prove ROI, then expand.
Payback window under 90 days. Don't delay — every month you wait is the monthly savings number, burned.

capture_cta.headline: Want the full breakdown?
capture_cta.description: I'll send your numbers + the 3 automations I'd prioritize for your setup (ranked by payback period), plus the exact n8n workflows I'd build for each.
